title: TauricResearch/TradingAgents
friendlyTitle: A research framework for AI trading agents
summary: TradingAgents is a multi-agent LLM framework for financial trading research that simulates analyst, researcher, trader, risk-management, and portfolio-manager roles. Recent releases added provider support, stability fixes, data-access controls, and newer model compatibility.
friendlySummary: TradingAgents uses several AI agents to imitate parts of a trading firm, such as analysts, researchers, traders, and risk managers.
whyItMatters: Researchers can use it to study how multi-agent debate, sentiment analysis, technical analysis, and risk review interact in financial decision workflows. It should be treated as a research framework rather than investment advice, but it is useful for exploring agent architecture in a high-stakes domain.
friendlyWhyItMatters: It can help researchers and builders learn how multi-agent systems work in finance, but it should not be treated as financial advice.
howItsUseful: Researchers can use it to study how multi-agent debate, sentiment analysis, technical analysis, and risk review interact in financial decision workflows. It should be treated as a research framework rather than investment advice, but it is useful for exploring agent architecture in a high-stakes domain.
friendlyHowItsUseful: It can help researchers and builders learn how multi-agent systems work in finance, but it should not be treated as financial advice.
